title: 6-day work week
content:
I'm not really working that much these days but how come I feel like I'm living a 7-day work week. Well, Sunday is church day so it's a 6-day work week. I need more leisure time.

While on the subject of leisure, the last movie I actually watched in the theater was ..umm.. (must check with [the neighbor](http://iningz.net/), I can't remember).

At least I have good food every once in a while. But [last Sunday](http://twitter.com/macsf/statuses/851110829) wasn't good, 4 out of 10 points.

To self: write text for the italy trip before you forget the detail!
